text: Surrounded by glass walls and stark lighting, I feel the sterile quiet of the modern world—spaces built for thought, collaboration, but presently echoing with emptiness. The R+D wall nearby is a reminder of our ceaseless drive to innovate, but its bright spectacle almost jars against the subdued hush outside. I feel small yet alert, prompted to reflect on human ambition and the quiet hunger behind collective creativity. There is invitation here—both to build, and to contemplate what remains unbuilt.
